options.name: Sprint Intervals
options.description: 2 min easy jog to warm up. Then 8 × 30 s sprint / 60 s walk. Cool down 1–2 min.
options.cue: Sprint at 80–90% — working hard, not all-out. Walk fully between. Sprints carry cold-start injury risk; the warm-up jog is not optional.

options.name: 12-min Run
options.description: Easy conversational pace for the full 12 min. No stops.
options.cue: Slower than you think. You should be able to say a sentence without gasping.

options.name: Bike — Hard Pushes
options.description: 5 min easy warm-up, then alternate 30 s hard / 90 s easy for the remaining time.
options.cue: Hard means legs burning. Easy means actually easy — not moderate.

options.name: Outdoor KB Circuit
options.description: AMRAP 12 min: KB swings 15 / goblet squat 10 / pushups 10. Rest as needed.
options.cue: Move with purpose, not urgency. Quality reps over rounds. Don't sacrifice the hinge for speed.

options.name: Jump-Rope Intervals
options.description: 40 s on / 20 s off for 12 min. Simple footwork — no tricks.
options.cue: Stay light on your feet. Land on the toes, not the heels. Keep the bounce small.
